title: Jake Wardle
extract:
Jake Wardle (born 18 November 1998) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a centre for the Wigan Warriors in the Super League, and England and the England Knights at international level.
He previously played for the Huddersfield Giants in the Super League and has spent time on loan from Huddersfield at the Warrington Wolves in the top flight. Earlier in his career he played as a winger.
